title: Greenhouse Zones: Sensor-Predicate Prefix-Cache Layout Ordering
strategies: identity layout: evaluate predicates in the given index order (baseline; sprinkle predicates sit at the front and shatter shared prefixes)
frequency-first layout: order predicates by how many checks reference them, ties by token weight, so frequent core predicates lead every prefix
weight-first layout: order predicates by descending token cost regardless of how often they occur
greedy construction against the true prefix-cache objective: fill the global order slot by slot, each time picking the predicate that maximizes total cache-hit tokens
